_metadata.description: District-owned properties in the Redwood City School District that are not currently RCSD-operated schools or RCSD-authorized charter school sites. Includes administrative buildings, leased-out former school sites, and operational facilities. Charter sites and district school sites are tracked separately in charters.json and schools.json respectively.

sources.districtInventory: TBD — seed data from Board President (2026-04-17); authoritative list pending

_metadata.status: seed — Harper School tenant name confirmed by Board President 2026-04-20; warehouse details still need verification

properties.name: District storage warehouse
properties.address: 1757 East Bayshore Road, Suites 4 & 6, Redwood City, CA 94063
properties.useLabel: Leased by the district (landlord: East Bayshore Investment Group, managed by Beals Martin Inc.)
properties.useLabelEs: Alquilado por el distrito (propietario: East Bayshore Investment Group, administrado por Beals Martin Inc.)

landlord.name: East Bayshore Investment Group
landlord.note: Beals Martin also manages the IMC / Instructional Materials Center building.

properties.notes: Commercial storage space (~2,868 sq ft). Lease use clause: "STORAGE FOR SCHOOL DISTRICT." Last board-approved renewal was 2022-08-24 (consent item 11.8) through 2023-08-31 at $6,020/mo. Current status pending verification with Business Services — no subsequent renewal has surfaced in the board-packet index.
